eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Chelan, WA; at 10:10 PM on JUL 4, 2026 Effective until 11:10 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Chelan County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 1 Fire Advisory for Navarre Coulee Road Mile Post 1.

The affected area is Navarre Coulee Road from 97a to mile post 4.

Please monitor local radio stations and Chelan County Emergency Management Facebook or the Chelan County Incident Map for updates. You will be kept advised as conditions change.  Please monitor local radio stations and Chelan County Emergency Management Face book for updates.
